articles.summary:
Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a novel Java-based remote access trojan (RAT) called QuimaRAT that's capable of targeting Windows, Linux, and macOS environments.

articles.title: Opera GX Flaw Let Malicious Sites Auto-Install Mods to Steal Data From Visited Pages
articles.summary: Researchers found a flaw in Opera GX, the gaming-focused version of the Opera browser, that let a malicious website silently install a browser add-on and use it to lift specific data from the pages a victim visits.

articles.title: SkillCloak Lets Malicious AI Agent Skills Evade Static Scanners with Self-Extracting Packing

articles.title: Flipper Zero firmware development continues with community help

articles.title: JadePuffer ransomware used AI agent to automate entire attack
articles.summary: Researchers identified what they believe is the first documented case of a ransomware operation, JadePuffer, conducted entirely by a large language model (LLM) agent. [...]

articles.title: translateZ()
articles.summary:
The translateZ() function moves an element closer to or farther from the user. 

translateZ() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

articles.title: translateY()
articles.summary:
The translateY() function shifts an element vertically by the specified amount. 

translateY() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.

articles.title: translateX()
articles.summary:
The translateX() function shifts an element horizontally by the specified amount. 

translateX() originally handwritten and published with love on CSS-Tricks. You should really get the newsletter as well.
